note: Cumulative dashboard state since v302 (which is what most cached browsers still show). Three supply cards in the supply row: TOTAL SUPPLY (green), CIRCULATING SUPPLY (true, berenjena #6B3F6B, = total - vault - pool), CIRCULATING MINING (red, miner-side only, = total - vault - pool - DTD lottery), GOLD VAULT, POPC POOL, DTD LOTTERY BALANCE (magenta). All six populate deterministically per tip with no background scan. cASERT panel header now renders the ceiling label correctly ("H20 (V12, #7,350+)" or "H13 (pre-V12, #5,750..#7,349)") instead of the literal text "+ceilingLabel+". Block lag countdown line uses getProfileFromLag() instead of a hardcoded Math.min(lag,10) cap, so the target profile matches the block-detail page and the lag-adjust indicator. Miner log is clearer about cASERT / bitsQ sync vs the node canonical value. This bump also fixes the cache-invalidation bug where v303 / v304 / v305 bumped a new "version" key but never touched the "v" key the auto-reload check actually reads.
